title: Thriller Bark’s Zombies Awaken: Key Exchange
description: In the Thriller Bark storyline, this section centers on Unknown person #1, Moria, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12 as the scene develops across pages 10–13.
scene: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #1, Moria, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #11, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Hey!! Where did the pirates go!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They ran away at full speed!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I won't let them get away !!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: His first word was "meat", which means...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: That huge monster's personality is definitely Luffy's.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: If so... try to remember it!!!

dialogue.speaker: Moria
dialogue.text: He doesn't care about saving people!!!

summary: This scene advances the Thriller Bark conflict through Unknown person #1, Moria, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #14, Unknown person #11, focusing on the immediate stakes of thriller bark’s zombies awaken: key exchange.
